message:
fix: improve update check feedback and timestamp handling (#9499)

Fixes #9495

- Channel change now triggers a fresh version check automatically
- "Check Now" shows transient "Up to date" banner on successful completion
- Developer channel's fetchLatestMainSHA now updates lastChecked timestamp
- Dev version detection no longer misidentifies Helm versions (e.g., "0.3.21")
  as dev builds — only "0.0.0", "unknown", and "dev" are treated as dev
- Dev mode warning only shown for actual dev installs (installMethod === 'dev')
  instead of any non-nightly/weekly version, reducing confusion for Helm users

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
